entries.source: "Reflect after a bad test"
entries.value: "Razmisli po slabem testu"

entries.source: "What learning strategy fits me?"
entries.value: "Katera učna strategija mi ustreza?"

entries.source: "Why did I avoid studying?"
entries.value: "Zakaj sem se izogibal učenju?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Mindset Reflection on inspir for planning learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Praktični vodnik za uporabo Mindset Reflection na inspir za načrtovalno učenje, s pozivi, učnimi zankami in varnejšimi navadami pri UI.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Jača studijska petlja

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal.
entries.value: Prilagodi sesiju svom cilju.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: UI učitelj

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Traži mali prvi korak, a ne končni odgovor.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Vprašajte UI da preverite svoje razmišljanje, a ne samo rezultat.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Završite pisanjem ideje iz memorije.

entries.source: Learners exploring planning topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Učenci, ki raziskujejo teme načrtovanja in želijo praktično usmerjanje namesto splošnega polja za odgovore.

entries.source: Mindset Reflection
entries.value: Razmislek o miselni naravnanosti

entries.source: Mindset Reflection AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Notice what helps you learn, what gets in the way, and how to become a stronger learner.
entries.value: Mindset Reflection način učenja z UI je osredotočen način uporabe UI za učenje namesto pasivnega zbiranja odgovorov. Način je zgrajen okoli posebne naloge: Notice what helps you learn, what gets in the way, and how to become a stronger learner.

entries.source: Mindset Reflection AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Mindset Reflection AI Learning Mode: praktični vodnik

entries.source: Planning
entries.value: Načrtovanje

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Traži da pokušate

entries.source: Reflect on how you learn.
entries.value: Razmisli o tome kako učiš.

entries.source: Start the live mode at Mindset Reflection. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Learning Game Master. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Pokrenite način života v Mindset Reflection. Ako želite susjedni oblik učenja, pokušajte učiti igre Master. Za širi pogled na platformu, pročitajte kar UI učeči pratilac treba učiniti za svakoga.

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Počnite z primerom poticaja.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Recite načinu rada kar pokušavate naučiti ali proizvesti.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Ta se razlika pojavljuje v protoku. Umjesto jedne divovske reakcije, najbolje seje kreču kroz petlju: postaviti cilj, pokušati nekar, dobiti povratne informacije, popraviti slabu točku, in odabrati sljedeču akciju.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: To je važno. Opčenito chatbot lahko odgovoriti gotovo na sve, ali način učenja daje razgovor oblik. To vas potiče prema vrsti razmišljanja, prakse, povratne informacije, ali raziščivanja ki pomaže ideja štap.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: To je ista navika za proučavanje z UI bez varanja: zadržati učenca aktivan. UI je najkorisniji ko vam daje povratnu informaciju o vašem razmišljanju.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Ovaj način rada posebno je koristen za učence ki žele:

entries.source: This mode is tuned for mindset reflection with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Ta način je prilagojen razmisleku o miselni naravnanosti z lastnimi pozivi, primeri in učnim tokom.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Pokušajte korak v svojim riječima.

entries.source: Use Mindset Reflection when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Uporabi Mindset Reflection, ko želiš sejo, ki se začne hitro, a se ti še vedno prilagodi. Prvi cilj ni zveneti impresivno. Prvi cilj je, da se naslednji korak zdi izvedljiv.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: S čime ta način rada pomaže

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Gdje iči sljedeče

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Lahko takodžer začeti z grubom verzijom vašeg pravog problema. Neuredan prvi prompt je v redu. Sekcija lahko pojasniti razinu, publiku, rok, in stil nakon kar počnete.
